name: Mennonite Schnitzel
recipeIngredient: 3 tablespoons melted veal or beef fat
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt veal or beef fat in a cast iron frying pan.
2. Sprinkle steaks with salt and pepper, then roll in flour.
3. Add onion to the pan, stirring until well coated with fat.
4. Cook over low heat 5-8 minutes, or until tender. Remove and press out as much fat as possible; set aside.
5. Brown meat lightly on both sides over medium heat.
6. Top with onions and pour boiling water over it.
7. Cover and simmer for 30-40 minutes, turning the meat once.
8. Add sour cream, cover, and simmer at a very low heat for 20 minutes. The meat will be tender and the gravy creamy.
